getAuthorId() - Method in class com.icarus.events.Comment
Returns the author's unique identifier.

Returns the author's profile image reference.
getAuthorName() - Method in class com.icarus.events.Comment
Returns the author's display name.

Returns the capacity of the event.

Returns the category of the event.

Returns the timestamp when the comment was created.

Retrieves the current FCM registration token for the device asynchronously.
getCurrentUser() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserSession
Returns the current user stored in this session.
getDocumentId() - Method in class com.icarus.events.Comment
Returns the Firestore document ID for this comment.

Returns the email of the user
getEndDate() - Method in class com.icarus.events.Event
Returns the end date of the event.
getEventId() - Method in class com.icarus.events.NotificationItem
Returns the unique identifier of the event associated with this notification.

Returns the image URL or resource path for the associated event.
getEventName() - Method in class com.icarus.events.NotificationItem
Returns the name of the event associated with this notification.

Returns the events that the user has registered/attended

Returns the fcm tokens for the user

Returns the unique identifier of the event.
getId() - Method in class com.icarus.events.NotificationItem
Returns the unique document ID for this notification.

Returns unique identifier for the user

Returns the reference for an image of the event.
getImage() - Method in class com.icarus.events.User
Returns the profile image URL of the user

Returns the singleton instance of UserSession.

Returns if the user is an admin

Returns the EventField at the specified position.

Returns the total number of events in the adapter's data set.

Returns the number of events currently displayed by the adapter.

Returns the total number of comments.
getItemCount() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsAdapter
Returns the number of event detail rows managed by this adapter.

Returns the location of the event.

Returns the main message content of the notification.

Returns the name of the event.

Returns the events that the user has organized

Returns the phone number of the user

Returns the date on which registration opens for the event.

Returns the list of currently selected comments.
